plugins.name: Kanban Board
plugins.description: Kanban-style board view for tasks with drag-and-drop columns.
plugins.author: Artificial Source
plugins.longDescription: Adds a fully interactive Kanban board view to Junban. Organize tasks into customizable columns (e.g. To Do, In Progress, Done) with drag-and-drop support. Perfect for visual thinkers who prefer board-style workflows over traditional lists.

plugins.name: Calendar View
plugins.description: Monthly/weekly calendar view showing tasks by due date.
plugins.author: Artificial Source
plugins.longDescription: Visualize your tasks on a monthly or weekly calendar. See deadlines at a glance, drag tasks to reschedule them, and plan your week ahead. Supports color-coded projects and priority indicators.

plugins.name: Time Tracking
plugins.description: Track time spent on tasks with start/stop timer and daily reports.
plugins.author: Artificial Source
plugins.longDescription: Built-in time tracking for any task. Start and stop timers with one click, view daily and weekly time reports, and understand where your time goes. All data stays local — no external services required.

plugins.name: Git Sync
plugins.description: Sync task data via Git for version control and multi-device access.
plugins.author: Artificial Source
plugins.longDescription: Keep your tasks in sync across multiple devices using Git. Automatically commits and pushes changes to a Git repository of your choice. Supports conflict resolution and works with any Git hosting provider (GitHub, GitLab, etc.).
